steps.t: Wood carvings can be found in Drû Bhûta. Examine wood carvings to hear the history of the Drúedain.
Suitable wood for carving can be found in Taur Drúadan. Find a piece of wood for Khûr-pulo-Skâl to make a carving for you.
Khûr-pulo-Skâl can be found in Drû Bhûta. You should bring the wood to Khûr-pulo-Skâl.

Khûr-pulo-Skâl can be found in Drû Bhûta. You should bring the wood to Khûr-pulo-Skâl.
Khûr-pulo-Skâl can be found in Drû Bhûta. You should bring the wood to Khûr-pulo-Skâl.
